overall.description: A nighttime scene in a futuristic cyberpunk city plaza featuring two giant holographic koi fish (one orange, one blue) swimming through the air between neon-lit skyscrapers. The camera slowly pans to follow the holographic display, showcasing the high-tech urban environment of Night City from Cyberpunk 2077 with wet reflective pavement and towering glass buildings illuminated by vibrant neon advertisements.

events.description: holographic orange and blue fish begin crossing paths in the center of the plaza

agents.ego_description: standing stationary in the plaza, observing the holographic fish display while slowly panning the camera to track their movement

entered.detail: tall skyscraper with distinctive vertical yellow neon lighting strips
large glowing orange koi fish hologram swimming through the air
large glowing blue koi fish hologram with flowing fins
circular structure in the plaza foreground with blue neon accent lighting
tall building covered in colorful neon advertisements and billboards

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a futuristic urban plaza at night, dominated by the Arasaka tower on the left with its vertical neon strips. Two massive holographic koi fish—one orange and one blue—swim through the air between the skyscrapers. The camera slowly pans right, following the fish as they begin to cross paths in the center of the frame. The wet pavement reflects the vibrant neon lights from the surrounding buildings.

events.description: holographic fish reach maximum separation with orange fish on far right and blue fish on left

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan the camera to follow the circular swimming pattern of the holographic fish

segments.scene_description: The camera continues panning as the holographic fish swim in their circular pattern, now positioned on opposite sides of the frame. The orange fish moves toward the right side of the view while the blue fish swims to the left. The Arasaka tower shifts slightly toward the center-left as the camera perspective changes, maintaining the immersive cyberpunk atmosphere with reflective wet surfaces and towering neon-lit architecture.

events.description: holographic fish return to positions similar to the start of the clip, completing the circular swimming pattern

agents.ego_description: completing the panoramic observation of the holographic display as the fish return to their starting positions

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the holographic fish complete their circular circuit and return toward their original positions, with the orange fish swimming back to the left side and the blue fish to the right. The camera finishes its slow pan, bringing the Arasaka tower back to the far left position. The continuous loop of the holographic display creates a mesmerizing centerpiece in the neon-drenched Night City plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, sweeping pan across a neon-drenched futuristic plaza as two massive holographic koi fish perform a circular dance between skyscrapers. It begins with the Arasaka tower anchoring the left side of the frame while the orange and blue fish swim toward each other over wet, reflective pavement. As the camera continues its rightward movement, the fish diverge to opposite sides of the view, shifting the perspective so the tower moves toward the center-left amidst the glowing urban architecture. The scene then follows the holographic creatures as they complete their circuit and return to their starting positions, before the camera finishes its pan to restore the Arasaka tower to the far left. This continuous motion captures the mesmerizing loop of the display, blending the fluid movement of the fish with the static, towering glass of Night City.
